capabilities.title: Split HelmApp workqueue keys into name and namespace segments
capabilities.title_zh: 将 HelmApp 队列键拆分为名称与命名空间片段

capabilities.title: Reconcile helm app configuring phase
capabilities.title_zh: 协调 Helm 应用进入配置阶段

capabilities.title: Reconcile helm app default values
capabilities.title_zh: 协调 Helm 应用默认值

capabilities.title: Reconcile helm app detecting phase
capabilities.title_zh: 协调 Helm 应用进入检测阶段

capabilities.title: Decide whether a HelmApp still needs default setup
capabilities.title_zh: 判断 HelmApp 是否仍需初始化默认配置

capabilities.title: Fetch HelmApp objects from the controller store lister
capabilities.title_zh: 从控制器 store lister 获取 HelmApp 对象

capabilities.title: Build full app store names from eid and store name
capabilities.title_zh: 根据 EID 与商店名构建完整应用商店名称

capabilities.title: Decide whether a configured HelmApp requires install or update
capabilities.title_zh: 判断已配置 HelmApp 是否需要安装或更新

capabilities.title: Describe pod status from conditions container states and events
capabilities.title_zh: 根据条件容器状态与事件归类 Pod 状态

capabilities.title: Execute third-component endpoint probes and map results
capabilities.title_zh: 执行第三方组件端点探测并映射结果

capabilities.title: Cache and evict third-component probe results
capabilities.title_zh: 缓存并清理第三方组件探测结果

capabilities.title: Derive pod names and volume ids from PVC names
capabilities.title_zh: 根据 PVC 名称解析 Pod 名与卷 ID

capabilities.title: Select storage node by available memory
capabilities.title_zh: 按可用内存选择存储节点

capabilities.title: Project storage classes into Rainbond volume types
capabilities.title_zh: 将存储类转换为 Rainbond 卷类型
